notes: Root cause: prod gaffer recognition broke when ChatMock (ChatGPT Plus OAuth proxy) hit HTTP 429 'usage limit reached' (single event 2026-05-14 in api logs) -> 503 AI_UNAVAILABLE. Fix: new FallbackLlmProvider wraps ordered legs; a leg 'fails for this request' on throw OR empty array (non-last legs); last leg's empty result returned as legit 'no equipment'. LLM_PROVIDER=fallback wires ChatMock (OPENAI_BASE_URL, maxRetries=1 fail-fast) primary -> direct api.openai.com (OPENAI_FALLBACK_API_KEY real sk-proj, OPENAI_FALLBACK_MODEL=gpt-4o, no baseURL) fallback. Review APPROVE no CRITICAL; applied: HIGH#1 maxRetries param on OpenAiLlmProvider (primary leg=1 so 429 storm hands off in ~1 round-trip vs ~7s backoff), MEDIUM getLlmProvider(fallback) wiring tests (+2), console.warn->console.info for non-error logs, 'unused' sentinel comment, test rename, .env.example placeholder. HIGH#2 (module cache needs restart on key rotation) documented — pre-existing pattern, pm2 reload restarts process anyway. 10 fallback unit tests total.
